comments.text:
I agree with the Sounders game takes. Goal had no reason to be disallowed like we just won't allow any contested headers anymore because of the chance they hit each other? 

The red seemed harsh but its more frustrating the whistle to give it stopped the advantage from being played and then revoked the card as well.  Had it just been a yellow in the first place I would've preferred the advantage be played.
